_comment: Single source of user-facing UI strings for the Omni UI rehaul. Consumed at runtime via src/lib/copy.ts (typed, frozen) — components import `copy` instead of hardcoding strings, so renames propagate from this one file. Internal SectionId/status enum values are unchanged; only display copy lives here. Human language over architecture — see PRODUCT.md. P1 (redesign-brief-v2.md) note: existing values are UNCHANGED from what components already render, so wiring components to this file is a no-op visually; 'home' and 'record' are new keys reserved for the P2 Home screen / Record-CTA build and are not yet consumed by any component.

nav.trustLine: Your data stays on this device
